title: Spicy Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired lamb tagine dish infused with spicy and fiery flavors, perfect for a chilly evening. This spicy lamb tagine is a twist on traditional Indian cuisine with the addition of fiery and spicy ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the harissa, cumin, coriander, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add the sliced red chilies and stir to combine.
Transfer the tagine to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve over couscous or rice, if desired.
